_meta.description: Operational reality and blind-spot scenario catalog for backend-first manufacturing governance.

scenarios.title: Duplicate submit and retry storm creates duplicate business documents
scenarios.why_it_happens: Browsers, mobile clients, integrations, or operators retry creates/actions after timeout or weak feedback.
scenarios.impact: Duplicate PO, SO, shipment, receipt, invoice, or inventory transactions distort KPI, cash, and traceability.

scenarios.title: Concurrent edits overwrite a governed state change
scenarios.why_it_happens: Two roles update the same record during planning, approval, dispatch, or close.
scenarios.impact: Loss of intent, stale release, mismatched quantities, and broken audit narrative.

scenarios.title: Receipt correction, return, or ASN mismatch is processed after invoice impact
scenarios.why_it_happens: Actual received quantity differs from PO, ASN, or invoice timing.
scenarios.impact: Supplier overpayment, wrong stock, incorrect quality lot, and broken three-way match.

scenarios.title: Quarantine or quality hold is bypassed and stock leaks to usable inventory or shipping
scenarios.why_it_happens: Items are released without finished inspection, disposition, or authorized release.
scenarios.impact: Defective material enters production or customer shipment.

scenarios.title: Lot, serial, or batch genealogy breaks during split, merge, rework, or return
scenarios.why_it_happens: Real production and warehouse operations split batches, re-identify items, or process returns.
scenarios.impact: Recall scope becomes wrong, root cause trace is incomplete, and compliance evidence fails.

scenarios.title: Engineering change, deviation, concession, or rework occurs after release
scenarios.why_it_happens: Production discovers a mismatch after job or shipment preparation has already started.
scenarios.impact: WO continues with obsolete instructions, wrong material, or uncontrolled concession.

scenarios.title: Calibration, permit, certificate, or training expires at execution time
scenarios.why_it_happens: Execution reaches a gate after a resource has become non-qualified.
scenarios.impact: Unsafe or noncompliant work proceeds, and evidence becomes invalid retroactively.

scenarios.title: Maintenance scheduling conflicts with production, tools, materials, or safety isolation
scenarios.why_it_happens: Scheduling ignores asset, worker, tool, material, or overlapping reservations.
scenarios.impact: Unsafe dispatch, missed maintenance window, or production downtime surprise.

scenarios.title: Negative inventory, UOM mismatch, or backflush variance hides a real material shortage
scenarios.why_it_happens: Warehouse and production postings are late, reversed, or converted inconsistently.
scenarios.impact: False availability, distorted cost, and wrong promise dates.

scenarios.title: Customer return, complaint, and credit process fails to close the physical and financial loop
scenarios.why_it_happens: Return arrives, inspection fails, replacement ships, and credit memo path diverges.
scenarios.impact: Inventory, NCR, customer care, and AR remain inconsistent.

scenarios.title: AP or AR posting happens in the wrong period or without a valid operational match
scenarios.why_it_happens: Backdated posting, duplicate invoice number, or released holds bypass standard controls.
scenarios.impact: Period close errors, duplicate payment, and audit exceptions.

scenarios.title: Offline execution or delayed sync causes stale decisions and replay collisions
scenarios.why_it_happens: Mobile or edge operations collect data without immediate central synchronization.
scenarios.impact: Double execution, stale inspections, or orphan evidence.

scenarios.title: Manual override is possible but not governed tightly enough
scenarios.why_it_happens: Real operations require exceptions, but override flows are not designed as first-class controlled actions.
scenarios.impact: Shadow process, bypassed gate, and unexplainable audit history.

scenarios.title: Background jobs, escalations, or monitoring fail silently
scenarios.why_it_happens: Schedulers, alert jobs, or exception aggregators stop running or fall behind.
scenarios.impact: Late permit renewal, missed expiry, stuck approvals, and false green dashboards.

scenarios.title: Unused or shadow elements stay active and create silent divergence
scenarios.why_it_happens: Legacy tables, orphan modules, and half-adopted objects remain mutable in production.
scenarios.impact: Split truth, duplicate master data, and false confidence about coverage.
